scripts.build:projects:smart: if [ -n "$CACHED_COMMIT_REF" ]; then echo 'Attempting changed-project build from' "$CACHED_COMMIT_REF" && yarn build:projects:changed || (echo 'Changed-project build failed; falling back to full project build.' && yarn build:projects); else echo 'No CACHED_COMMIT_REF; running full project build.' && yarn build:projects; fi
